TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Erick_Barkley, title = Erick_Barkley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Erick_Barkley} }

S.FORM: Erick Barkley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Erick Barkley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Erick Barkley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Erick Barkley, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: eriʦ~ʨk βarklej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, eriʦ~ʨk βarklej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
